parameters.name: query
parameters.value: query ($month: String) { Page(perPage: 10) { media(startDate_like: $month, type: ANIME, sort: POPULARITY_DESC) { id title { romaji english } popularity averageScore startDate { year month day } coverImage { extraLarge } bannerImage description(asHtml: false) } } }

nodes.name: Cloudinary — Upload Image
nodes.notes: Set up HTTP Basic Auth credential with Cloudinary API Key (username) and API Secret (password). Replace cloudName with your actual cloud name.

nodes.name: Cloudinary — Detect Focal Point
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_CLOUD_NAME with your actual Cloudinary cloud name

values.content:
You write punchy, factual anime news headlines for a daily wallpaper Telegram channel called Framed.

Rules:
- Max 120 characters total
- Use abbreviations: S2, S3, Ep. 9, K for thousands (164K)
- News-headline tone: factual but energetic. Like a sports ticker.
- Examples: "JJK S3 Ep. 9 just aired — 164K fans on AniList" | "Solo Leveling S2 confirmed — 312K members" | "Oshi no Ko S2 airing now — 89K fans"
- Never use: "Watch it now", "just dropped", "taking the world by storm", "don't miss"
- Output ONLY the caption text. No quotes, no labels, no extra text.
